programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - EP740
programme.desc: The five members of the losing team from yesterday's afternoon tea challenge enter the MasterChef Australia kitchen in what promises to be one of the most dramatic episodes of the season.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Mystery Box Challenge & Invention Test
programme.desc: In the invention test, the winner of the mystery box challenge will get to decide on the pantry items.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Pressure Test: Janice Wong's Cassis Plum
programme.desc: The pressure test has been set by guest chef Janice Wong.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Immunity Challenge: Batter
programme.desc: The contestants have 30 minutes to create a dish that showcases batter.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Team Challenge
programme.desc: The contestants will take part in a barbecue battle in the MasterChef Australia garden.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Elimination Challenge: Rick Stein
programme.desc: The judges reveal that the challenge is all about fish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Mystery Box Challenge
programme.desc: The top eight contestants take a trip down memory lane.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Pressure Test
programme.desc: The bottom four contestants from the invention test must cook off to survive in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: In an immunity challenge like no other, the two contestants will cook off against two professional chefs.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Off-site Challenge: Circa: The Prince
programme.desc: The judges reveal the contestants will be preparing a seven-course degustation menu for 40 diners.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Elimination Challenge: Time Auction
programme.desc: The contestants facing elimination will take part in a time auction.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Marco Pierre White Team Challenge
programme.desc: As promised, Marco Pierre White returns to see how far the contestants have come.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Pressure Test: Cook-Along
programme.desc: With no recipe and no clock, three contestants must cook along with Marco Pierre White

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: It is the last immunity pin up for grabs before finals week.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Team Challenge: French Restaurants
programme.desc: This episode splits the contestants into two teams and will be responsible for every aspect of the restaurant.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Elimination Challenge: Childhood Memories
programme.desc: The contestants need to draw on childhood memories as an inspiration for their dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Mystery Box Challenge
programme.desc: The top five contestants enter the kitchen to face the last mystery box challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Pressure Test
programme.desc: The three contestants from the invention test will cook off in a pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Pressure Test
programme.desc: The three contestants from the invention test will cook off in a pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - No Rules Challenge
programme.desc: In this challenge the contestants can choose their own cuisine and whether it's sweet or savoury.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - EP760
programme.desc: While one contestant has safely made it through to the semi-final, the remaining three are fighting it out to stay in the competition in a pressure test that will stretch them to their limits.

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - EP20
programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - My Big Fat Greek Game Show
programme.desc: George Stathoulis and his big Greek family take over the show in a plate-breaking and suspense filled game.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - There's Snow Place Like Home
programme.desc: Deal or No Deal USA

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Mile-High Millionaire
programme.desc: Flight attendant, Max Reynolds is used to high-flying adventures.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Wall Street Warrior
programme.desc: Lisa Glicksman knows exactly what kind of fight is needed to beat The Banker.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Five Dollar Redemption
programme.desc: Deal or No Deal history collides on stage when Artis Jackson gets the chance to redeem his family’s honor.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Happy Howie Days
programme.desc: Howie Mandel's hit game show is back after 10 years with a heart-warming holiday special.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Million Dollar Ironman
programme.desc: Miami police officer and Ironman competitor Jorge Montero seeks to secure his children's future.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Small Town, Big Dreams
programme.desc: Loveable Bryce Gage has big dreams for his small town, Marble Falls, TX.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - I'm Dancin' Here!
programme.desc: Howie Mandel’s hit game show is back with new twists and turns!

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Million Dollar Lane
programme.desc: Double the deals, double the drama - bowling champion Kyera presses on in her battle against The Banker.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP39
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP32
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP11
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP12
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Sony's Choice
programme.desc: One of Deal or No Deal’s biggest fans, Sony Avalos is clear she knows how to play the game better than anyone.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Ice Cream Dreams
programme.desc: Entrepreneur, Ally Teixeira has sweet dreams that will change the face of the ice cream industry forever.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Vision Quest
programme.desc: South Dakota’s Jade Delaney believes in the power of positive thinking and she has a vision board to prove it.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Magic Touch
programme.desc: In another incredible combo game of Deal or No Deal, two new contestants fill the studio with magical moments.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Cowboy Up
programme.desc: Real life Las Vegas hero, Justin Uhart storms the stage ready to risk it all for his chance at $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Head Over Heels
programme.desc: Philadelphia’s Missy Silverman shakes up the stage with her boundless energy.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP25
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (25 out of 39)

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP11
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (11 out of 39)

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - EP761
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia Season 07

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Grand Final: Part 2
programme.desc: Tune in as the winner of MasterChef Australia 2015 will be crowned.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP1
programme.desc: Fifty talented home cooks from around the country compete for just 24 MasterChef aprons.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP2
programme.desc: At the MasterChef kitchen, the Top 24 contestants face a mystery box challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP3
programme.desc: The Top 16 contestants move into the MasterChef house then face a fish challenge in the MasterChef kitchen.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP4
programme.desc: The Top 15 contestants must replicate a gourmet egg dish created by award-winning Auckland chef Simon Wright.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP5
programme.desc: The Top 14 contestants face a mystery box challenge in which they must cook one savoury and one sweet dish.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP6
programme.desc: The contestants must reinvent one of three classic dishes – macaroni cheese, roast lamb or trifle.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP7
programme.desc: The contestants face their first team challenge and first full service

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP8
programme.desc: The contestants tackle a ‘heads and tails’ challenge in which they must cook lesser-known cuts of meat.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP9
programme.desc: The Top 10 contestants cook one savoury dish and one sweet dish for the MasterChef judges.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP10
programme.desc: The Top Nine contestants cook with their ‘weapons of choice’ – a cream canister, smoking gun or blow torch.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP11
programme.desc: The The Top Eight contestants cook a three course dinner for 80 guests.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP12
programme.desc: The contestants must each cook a dish using My Food Bag ingredients.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP13
programme.desc: There’s a big travel prize up for grabs as the Top Six contestants cook dishes featuring New Zealand clams.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP14
programme.desc: The Top Five contestants must replicate a complicated dessert.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP15
programme.desc: At Al Maha resort in the Arabian desert, the Top Four contestants pair off to cook a seven-course feast.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP16
programme.desc: At Grosvenor House in Dubai, the contestants cook a three-course meal for 24 guests.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP17
programme.desc: In the semi-final, the top three contestants cook their signature dishes for the judges.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP18
programme.desc: The two finalists face three epic challenges to decide who will win the MasterChef New Zealand title.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Premiere
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia returns with the best group of home cooks the competition has ever seen.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - 2nd Judges' Auditions
programme.desc: In the second judges' auditions our amateur cooks are given one hour to cook their best dish.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP27
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (27 out of 39)

programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. (22 out of 39)

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP2
programme.desc: A mom-to-be tries to find one of five million-dollar cases, and surprises her husband.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP3
programme.desc: NASCAR's Jimmie Johnson drops by to meet a player from Rhode Island.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP4
programme.desc: The Banker offers a Detroit video-game fan the chance to become a game character.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP5
programme.desc: A pharmacy technician competes.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP6
programme.desc: A newly married woman from Kansas City, Kan., plays a game with six $1 million cases.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP7
programme.desc: Seven $1 million cases are in the mix for a male nurse from Pennsylvania.
